channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: How to revoke connection OAuth programmatically in Logic Apps
item.description: There are multiple ways to revoke the OAuth of an API Connection other than clicking on the Revoke button in the portal: For using the "Invoke an HTTP request": Get the connection name: Create a Logic App (Consumption), use a trigger of your liking, then add the “Invoke an HTTP request”...
item.dc:creator: Omar_Abu_Arisheh

item.title: Windows 11 Taskbar icons on multiple screens
item.description: In Windows 11, small icons on the right side of the taskbar only show on the main screen and are hidden on other monitors. How to make them appear on all monitors?
item.dc:creator: Komondor2240

item.title: Windows 11 IRQL_NOT_LESS_OR_EQUAL Blue Screen
item.description: My Windows 11 PC shows IRQL_NOT_LESS_OR_EQUAL blue screen with ntoskrnl.exe error on startup. It works normally after a forced restart, and this has happened twice. Seeking the cause and solutions.
item.dc:creator: Castiellm

item.title: Windows 11 Can't View Data Usage
item.description: When opening Data Usage in Windows 11, an uncloseable abnormal pop-up appears and I can't view my data usage. Seeking solutions to fix this issue.
item.dc:creator: Wrentdr

item.title: How do I completely Uninstall League of Legends on my pc?
item.description: So I tried removing League of Legends from my PC, but it doesn't seem completely gone. I used the normal uninstall option, yet I still notice leftover files and folders. Not sure if I missed a step or if Riot’s client just leaves things behind.The goal is a clean uninstall — no leftover data, no...
item.dc:creator: Dilanniss

item.title: What Are the Actual Risks of still using Windows computer?
item.description: For context I don't use my PC for anything other than gaming I don't visit any shade websites only occasionally pirate games from a popular girl on internet , i only visit steam and just scroll youtube and Amazon - just deleted my bank details from previous orders today to keep safe What am I doing...
item.dc:creator: Ignaciojun

item.title: Can someone help me on Windows PC?
item.description: Before I entered the command, my Spotify had already been running for two minutes.
item.dc:creator: Zevam

item.title: The best ai cool text generator for making fancy fonts
item.description: Hi everyone,Been seeing people use those fancy or stylish fonts in social media posts, usernames, and bios, and it looks pretty cool. Not really sure what tool they’re using or how it actually works. Someone mentioned something called a “cool text generator,” but I don’t fully understand what that...
item.dc:creator: RogerMinn

item.title: How to completely remove installed apps from mac?
item.description: I am looking for a reliable way to completely remove applications from my Mac without leaving behind orphaned files in the system folders. While I know I can simply drag an app from the Applications folder to the Trash, I've noticed that this often leaves behind several gigabytes of garbage data...
item.dc:creator: Misaellm

item.title: Agents League: Meet the Winners
item.description: Agents League brought together developers from around the world to build AI agents using Microsoft's developer tools. With 100+ submissions across three tracks, choosing winners was genuinely difficult. Today, we're proud to announce the category champions. 🎨 Creative Apps Winner: CodeSonify View...
item.dc:creator: aycabas

item.title: Assess Security risks with Insights in Azure Migrate
item.description: Why Security matters in Migration Migrating to the cloud is not only about speed and cost efficiency, it's also about building a secure foundation on Azure. As organizations move workloads to Azure, security often slips down the priority list, overshadowed by migration tasks and timelines. But...
item.dc:creator: Nikita_Bajaj

item.title: Project Nighthawk: A Research Agent Built for Field Engineering
item.description: If you work in field engineering, you know the scenario. A customer is deploying AKS in a regulated environment. They hit an issue during node bootstrapping. They want to know exactly what happens when a node joins the cluster, which components run in which order, and whether the behaviour they’re...
item.dc:creator: Diego Casati, Ray Kao

item.title: Resolving MachineWithSameBiosIdAndFqdnAlreadyExists During Azure Migrate Mobility Agent Registration
item.description: While working on an Azure Migrate project, we encountered a failure during Mobility Agent registration with the error: <ErrorCode>MachineWithSameBiosIdAndFqdnAlreadyExists</ErrorCode> This error code is identified in C:\ProgramData\ASRSetupLogs\ASRUnifiedAgentConfigurator.log file on Source Server....
item.dc:creator: vihegde

item.title: Upcoming deprecation of Claude Sonnet 4 in GitHub Copilot
item.description: We will deprecate the following model across all GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions) on 5/1/2026: Model Deprecation date Suggested alternative… The post Upcoming deprecation of Claude Sonnet 4 in GitHub Copilot appeared first...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: AWS to Azure Migration — From the Cloud Economics & FinOps Lens
item.description: “ROI fails when FinOps joins late.” That single pattern explains why many cloud migrations deliver technical success but financial disappointment. Workloads move. SLAs hold. Teams celebrate go‑live. Then the CFO asks: Where are the savings we modeled? In most cases, FinOps was engaged after...
item.dc:creator: sakshimalhotra

item.title: Building with Azure Skills
item.description: Part 3 of the Azure Skills Plugin series Previously: How to Install the Azure Plugin You’ve installed the Azure Skills Plugin. The Azure MCP server is running. You have a huge collection of tools and skills at your disposal. So, now what do you actually say to it? This post is a prompt cookbook....
item.dc:creator: Chris Harris

item.title: Simplify troubleshooting at scale - Centralized Log Management for CycleCloud Workspace for Slurm
item.description: Training large AI models on hundreds or thousands of nodes introduces a critical operational challenge: when a distributed job fails, quickly identifying the root cause across scattered logs can become incredibly time-consuming. This manual process delays recovery and reduces cluster utilization....
item.dc:creator: jesselopez

item.title: Microsoft Entra: What’s new in secure access on the AI frontier
item.description: Agentic AI is front and center as Microsoft welcomes security professionals to Ignite this week in San Francsico. Advancements in AI and agents are already assisting identity and networks access teams in frontier firms.[1] For example, a recent Microsoft study[2] found that admins using the...
item.dc:creator: Joy_Chik

item.title: Surfing the AI Wave: Manage, govern, and protect AI agents with Microsoft Entra Agent ID
item.description: Last month, when I blogged about riding the AI wave, I reviewed the reality of AI Agent adoption, basic information about agents, and the challenge of managing them at scale. I could only hint about what we’d announce at Microsoft Ignite: a huge update for the Microsoft Entra Agent ID public...
item.dc:creator: Alex_Simons

item.title: External MFA in Microsoft Entra ID is now generally available
item.description: Multifactor authentication remains a foundational control for securing user identities, especially as organizations adopt Zero Trust and respond to increasingly targeted identity attacks. Microsoft’s research shows that MFA reduces the risk of account compromise by more than 99 percent. Microsoft...
item.dc:creator: Swaroop Krishnamurthy

item.title: Strengthen identity resilience: Recover with confidence using Microsoft Entra Backup and Recovery
item.description: Identity is the backbone of modern security. When identity systems fail, access breaks down, productivity stops, and security controls weaken across the organization. That is why Microsoft invests deeply in resilience across Microsoft Entra, designing the service not only to meet a 99.99%...
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dadzie

item.title: Microsoft Sentinel is now supported in Unified RBAC with row-level access
item.description: Enabling streamlined, granular, and scalable permissions We’re excited to announce the Public Preview of Unified Role Based Access Control (URBAC) for Microsoft Sentinel, together with row-level access. This new capability, available in April, extends the Microsoft Defender Unified RBAC model to...
item.dc:creator: tomasbeerthuis

item.title: Microsoft Entra Tenant Governance: Secure and manage multi-tenant environments at scale
item.description: Managing identity across multiple tenants is a growing challenge for organizations of all sizes. Mergers, acquisitions, and the rise of shadow IT often lead to a fragmented tenant landscape—creating security and compliance blind spots that attackers are quick to exploit. Even a single poorly...
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dadzie

item.title: Evolving identity security: How the Conditional Access Optimization Agent helps you adapt
item.description: Organizations are expanding Zero Trust across more users, applications, and now a growing population of AI agent identities, making it even more challenging to maintain visibility and control at scale. As environments grow more complex and change daily, static best-practice approaches can’t keep...
item.dc:creator: Swaroop Krishnamurthy

item.title: Powering Event Driven Payments with Stripe and Azure Event Grid
item.description: Introduction Modern commerce systems are increasingly event-driven. Payments, subscriptions, refunds, disputes, and customer updates all generate signals that downstream systems must react quickly and reliably. Stripe events give developers real-time visibility into what is happening inside their...
item.dc:creator: robece

item.title: Intune MAM - Questions about Company Data Removal
item.description: Hey all, we're looking to deploy Intune MAM for an organization. The organization only has BYOD devices (users have their own personal phones and company-provided phones are NOT an option.) Our end goal is the ability to wipe company data from a phone once a user has been offboarded (Outlook,...
item.dc:creator: lilbopeeps

item.title: Data Removal using MAM Policies
item.description: undefined
item.dc:creator: lilbopeeps

item.title: Continued Investment in Azure App Service
item.description: This blog was originally published to the App Service team blog Recent Investments Premium v4 (Pv4) Azure App Service Premium v4 delivers higher performance and scalability on newer Azure infrastructure while preserving the fully managed PaaS experience developers rely on. Premium v4 offers...
item.dc:creator: Byron Tardif

item.title: GitHub secret scanning — coverage update
item.description: GitHub secret scanning continually updates its detectors, validators, and analyzers. Here’s what’s new. Nine new secret detectors from seven providers, including Langchain, Salesforce, and Figma. Secrets from Figma, Google, OpenVSX,… The post GitHub secret scanning — coverage update appeared first...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Aspire 13.2: Dashboard Gets Smarter Export and Telemetry
item.description: Aspire 13.2 brings powerful new dashboard features for exporting and importing telemetry, querying telemetry via API, and improved GenAI telemetry visualization. The post Aspire 13.2: Dashboard Gets Smarter Export and Telemetry appeared first on Aspire Blog.
item.dc:creator: James Newton-King

item.title: The threat to critical infrastructure has changed. Has your readiness?
item.description: Five facts critical infrastructure (CI) leaders need to act on in 2026, grounded in what Microsoft Threat Intelligence is observing across sectors right now. The post The threat to critical infrastructure has changed. Has your readiness? appeared first on Microsoft Security Blog.
item.dc:creator: Sherrod DeGrippo

item.title: Visual Studio March Update – Build Your Own Custom Agents
item.description: This month’s Visual Studio update gives you new ways to customize GitHub Copilot. Custom agents allow you to build specialized Copilot agents tailored to your team’s workflow, backed by the tools and knowledge sources that matter to your project. Alongside that, agent skills bring reusable...
item.dc:creator: Mark Downie

item.title: Agent-driven development in Copilot Applied Science
item.description: I used coding agents to build agents that automated part of my job. Here's what I learned about working better with coding agents. The post Agent-driven development in Copilot Applied Science appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Tyler McGoffin

item.title: Applying security fundamentals to AI: Practical advice for CISOs
item.description: Read actionable advice for CISOs on securing AI, managing risk, and applying core security principles in today’s AI‑powered environment. The post Applying security fundamentals to AI: Practical advice for CISOs appeared first on Microsoft Security Blog.
item.dc:creator: Yonatan Zunger

item.title: High Volume Email reaches General Availability in Exchange Online
item.description: As we discussed High Volume Email (HVE) several times since it was in Public Preview, I wanted to make you aware that Exchange Online HVE now reached General Availability (GA). The announcement was made on the Microsoft 365 Blog here: High Volume Email Is Now Available in Exchange Online Pricing is...
item.dc:creator: Nino_Bilic

item.title: CodeQL 2.25.0 adds Swift 6.2.4 support
item.description: CodeQL is the static analysis engine behind GitHub code scanning, which finds and remediates security issues in your code. We’ve recently released CodeQL 2.25.0, which upgrades Swift analysis to 6.2.4,… The post CodeQL 2.25.0 adds Swift 6.2.4 support appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Get notified when scheduled jobs fail in Fabric (Generally Available)
item.description: If you haven’t already, check out Arun Ulag’s hero blog “FabCon and SQLCon 2026: Unifying databases and Fabric on a single, complete platform” for a complete look at all of our FabCon and SQLCon announcements across both Fabric and our database offerings. When you set up a scheduled job, the goal...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: WhatsApp malware campaign delivers VBScript and MSI backdoors
item.description: A malware campaign uses WhatsApp messages to deliver VBS scripts that initiate a multi-stage infection chain. The attack leverages renamed Windows tools and cloud-hosted payloads to install MSI backdoors and maintain persistent access to compromised systems. The post WhatsApp malware campaign...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft Defender Security Research Team

item.title: CodeQL pull requests insights on security overview now cover all protected branches
item.description: The CodeQL pull request insights tab in GitHub security overview now reports Copilot Autofix and alert statistics from all protected branches, not just the default branch. This gives you a… The post CodeQL pull requests insights on security overview now cover all protected branches appeared first...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: The Durable Task Scheduler Consumption SKU is now Generally Available
item.description: Today, we're excited to announce that the Durable Task Scheduler Consumption SKU has reached General Availability. Developers can now run durable workflows and agents on Azure with pay-per-use pricing, no storage to manage, no capacity to plan, and no idle costs. Just create a scheduler, connect...
item.dc:creator: greenie-msft

item.title: Announcing the latest innovations in Fabric Data Factory: Apache Airflow jobs and pipelines
item.description: Introduction The world of data integration is rapidly evolving, and staying up to date with the latest technologies is crucial for organizations seeking to make the most of their data assets. Available now are the newest innovations in Fabric Data Factory pipelines and Apache Airflow job...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Am I using Windows 98 right?
item.description: Experience AI like it's 1998. A fully private, on-device assistant in an authentic retro desktop — boot sequence, Start menu, and CRT glow. No internet needed.Step back in time and into the future.AI Desktop 98 wraps a powerful on-device AI assistant inside a fully interactive retro desktop,...
item.dc:creator: Yahyati

item.title: How do I stop Firefox from automatically opening any PDF I download?
item.description: Under Settings -> Applications, PDF is set to save file, yet every time I download a PDF, it is automatically opened and not by the windows default program associated with PDFs. How do I stop this from happening?
item.dc:creator: Jerichouy

item.title: What do I do if my acer laptop is stuck on the loading screen?
item.description: Hi all,Ran into a weird issue today. My Acer laptop powers on, shows the logo, then just stuck on the loading screen forever. No error message, no progress. Left it like that for quite a while but nothing changed.Not very experienced with troubleshooting stuff like this, so a bit hesitant to try...
item.dc:creator: Mikdao

item.title: How to Report Entra ID Group Insights
item.description: Entra ID Group Insights are a new preview feature in the Entra admin center. The lack of documentation is challenging, but it’s easy to understand what kind of insights Microsoft wants to deliver. Looking behind the scenes, we find the Graph endpoint for Group insights and can extract the data....
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: How Stibo Systems’ MDM powers trusted data for analytics and AI in Microsoft Fabric (Preview)
item.description: The preview of the Stibo Systems Master Data Management (MDM) workload on Microsoft Fabric which integrates enterprise customers’ master data and ingests it directly into Fabric OneLake through their DaaS (Data as a service) feature to unlock analytics and AI use-cases for them is now available.
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Sensitivity labels in Fabric for public APIs (Generally Available)
item.description: To support advanced governance and automation scenarios, Sensitivity Labels are now exposed through Microsoft Fabric Public APIs. This enables developers, partners, and platform teams to programmatically get and manage sensitivity labels as part of information classification and AI workflows....
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Subscription Vending in Azure: An Implementation Overview
item.description: Subscription vending is a process that enables the creation of multiple Azure subscriptions using code, based on organizational segregation or workload-specific requirements. Rather than relying on resource groups as the primary boundary, this approach treats subscriptions as the fundamental unit...
item.dc:creator: abhilashasr

item.title: EU data residency region expanding to include EFTA countries
item.description: Starting May 1, 2026, the EU data residency region for GitHub Enterprise Cloud on ghe.com will include Azure infrastructure in EFTA (European Free Trade Association) countries—specifically Norway and Switzerland—in addition… The post EU data residency region expanding to include EFTA countries...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Azure Developer CLI (azd) – March 2026: Run and Debug AI Agents Locally, GitHub Copilot Integration, & Container App Jobs
item.description: Run, invoke, and monitor AI agents locally or in Microsoft Foundry with the new azd AI agent extension commands. Plus GitHub Copilot-powered project setup, Container App Jobs deployment, local preflight validation, and configurable timeouts. The post Azure Developer CLI (azd) – March 2026: Run and...
item.dc:creator: PuiChee (PC) Chan
